item.title: China Is Building Another Massive Base in the South China Sea
item.description: The work at Antelope Reef, which could give Beijing another runway and more missile facilities, caught some analysts by surprise

item.title: The U.S. and China Are in a Strategic Stalemate. What Comes Next.
item.description: Plus, why the ‘frown curve’ explains the modern Chinese market.

item.title: Japan Is Fortifying This String of Islands Close to China
item.description: Tokyo’s fortifications to protect its southwestern islands have an added advantage: They complicate China’s freedom of maneuver.

item.title: Opinion | China Keeps Trying to Punish Tokyo
item.description: Trump can help an ally by stopping in Tokyo on his way to Beijing.

item.title: Baidu’s Apollo Go Robotaxis Stall in China’s Wuhan
item.description: Wuhan police said preliminary findings indicated that the incidents were caused by a system failure.

item.title: China Manufacturing Gauge Shows Slower Expansion in Activity
item.description: A private gauge of China’s manufacturing activity eased from a five-year high in March, though it stayed in expansionary territory amid rising price and supply pressures.

item.title: U.S. Court Ruling Keeps Mao Documents Out of China
item.description: The diaries of an aide to former Chinese leader Mao Zedong can remain at Stanford University, a federal judge ruled.

item.title: China PMIs Signal Resilience as Mideast War Raises Uncertainty
item.description: A gauge of activity in China’s sprawling manufacturing sector returned to expansion in March.

item.title: China Hits Back at U.S. With New Trade Probes Ahead of Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: The Chinese probes mirror new investigations by the U.S. that could raise tariffs on Chinese goods.

item.title: As China Encroaches, Even New Zealand Is Getting Serious About Its Military
item.description: Billions will be spent in the coming years—including on missiles, drones and base upgrades—as the remote country squares up to a widening threat.

item.title: The U.S. Navy’s New Insurance Policy for War With China Is an Australian Base
item.description: The Pentagon plans to deploy submarines to an expanding facility in allies’ strategy to deter Beijing.

item.title: U.S. Builds Tech Bloc to Counter China, Adds India as Newest Member
item.description: With Pax Silica, the Trump administration is retreating from an adversarial stance it took toward allies and friends last year.
